Program

Emergency and Disaster Management program is to train qualified technicians who are physically healthy and strong, able to make quick and correct decisions, careful, cold-blooded and strong sense of responsibility, high communication skills, examining the scene and the patient / injured and applying emergency rescue techniques according to the situation. In line with the above-mentioned objectives, in the Emergency and Disaster Management Laboratory, students are taught issues such as ensuring patient safety to be applied in emergencies, transporting the patient and injured with appropriate methods, etc., the use of intervention equipment, case studies are carried out. In the laboratory, first aid courses are also held, basic life support, coma positioning, shock positioning, patient / injured transportation methods are taught using materials such as models and stretchers.
